name: 07_forecast_pipeline
description: Runs 07_consumption_forecast notebook. Generates gold_consumption_forecast — 7-day Prophet forecast per building with HDD/CDD + occupancy regressors. Called by 04_master_orchestrator as Stage_5_Forecast. Requires gold_kpi_daily (Stage_4) to exist.

activities.name: Run_Consumption_Forecast
activities.description: 07_consumption_forecast: Prophet time-series model per building via Pandas UDF. Regressors: hdd_day, cdd_day (weather), avg_occ_biz_hours (occupancy). Fallback to neutral 0.5 occupancy if gold_occupancy_profile unavailable. Output: gold_consumption_forecast (7 rows per building).
